name: Docs & Changelog
summary: Verify shipped behavior, update durable public docs and the changelog together, and open a draft docs PR.
prerequisites: GitHub connected, with read access to the source repository and write access to the documentation repository.
Document the public docs URL, docs platform, changelog location, repository structure, and project voice rules.
Provide a reliable release source such as a shipped-features Slack channel, merged PR event, release webhook, or direct request.
